name: 脆弱坦白型
description: 在衝突積累到極點後，男主卸下所有防備，用最直白的語言表達內心矛盾和深情。這種反差型告白最打動觀眾，因為它打破了角色一貫的強勢形象。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: I hate you, yet I can't let you go. The moment you show up, I forgot all the damn harsh words we once said. I can't be a stranger to you. Tell me what I am supposed to do. Tell me.
